invariants.description: GBP_VERSION present and non-empty; asserted at import
BANKRUPTCY_THRESHOLD in (0.0,1.0) exclusive; enforced at construction
Every declaration event appended to append-only JSONL; 'a' mode only
Each ledger entry carries prev_digest; chain verified via hmac.compare_digest
_load() discharge supersession: last ledger entry per epoch_id wins
Empty mutation_intent raises GBPViolation; blank-intent bypass is constitutional violation
Discharged epoch_id may not be re-activated; raises GBPViolation on attempt
